about.description: General information about Parul University, its history, mission, vision, leadership, and institutional overview.

research.description: Research activities, innovation initiatives, development centres, research publications, patents, and academic research programs.

awards.description: University rankings, awards, recognitions, ratings, accreditations, and achievements.

placements.description: Placement cell information, internships, company visits, training programs, recruitment statistics, and career opportunities.

life_at_pu.description: Campus life, extracurricular activities, student clubs, cultural events, sports, and student engagement activities.

iqac.description: Internal Quality Assurance Cell information, academic quality measures, institutional governance, and compliance.

student_services.description: Student support services, welfare programs, hostel services, counseling, scholarships, and student facilities.

connect.description: Contact information, university communication channels, address, phone numbers, email, and enquiry details.

admissions_overview.description: Online admissions overview, academic programs, distance learning, and admission-related announcements.

how_to_apply.description: Admission process, application steps, required documents, eligibility criteria, and application guidelines.

apply_portal.description: Official admission application portal for submitting online applications and tracking admission status.

all_programs.description: List of all academic programs offered including undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral programs.

careers.description: University job vacancies, faculty recruitment, staff openings, and career opportunities at Parul University.

privacy_policy.description: University privacy policy, data protection guidelines, and legal information.

terms_of_use.description: Terms and conditions for using the university website and services.

wikipedia.description: Third-party encyclopedic overview of Parul University including history, academic structure, and public information.

shiksha_profile.description: Educational portal profile of Parul University including student reviews, rankings, programs, and admission details.
